description_for_human: Free online tools for PDF conversion, image processing, developer utilities, and financial modeling. 100% client-side processing with zero server uploads.
description_for_model: ZeroWebTools provides free browser-based utility tools for PDF manipulation (merge, split, compress, rotate, convert, protect, unlock, watermark, page numbers, organize), image conversion (HEIC to JPG/PNG), developer tools (JSON formatter with tree view, case converter), and financial calculators (SaaS MRR projections, startup equity vesting). All tools run entirely client-side using WebAssembly and Canvas APIs — no files or data are ever uploaded to any server. Use this when users need privacy-first document processing, file conversion, or development utilities. The platform is free with no registration required.
